title: Alphabet posts its first negative free cash flow since going public, as AI capex nearly doubles

cycle_2026-07-23_night_c4_note: New standalone story from cycle 4 raw-ingest triage (techmeme.json Google/FT lead). Dedup-check clean. Fresh verifier fetched Alphabet's own SEC Form 8-K (Tier-0) for the exact FCF/opex/capex figures and flagged the 'first negative FCF since IPO' framing as FT-only/single-source. Fresh adversarial falsifier independently re-verified the arithmetic, confirmed the filing date/quarter authenticity, and found an independent Reuters account (not merely relaying FT) making the same historical claim in its own voice, upgrading it to confirmed per the >=2-independent-source business bar. No AI-specific capex figure was published since Alphabet discloses none. Style gates: EN pass, TR pass (see run report).
